description_long: This shotgun features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular body. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a cylindrical suppressor or muzzle device attached at the front. The receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail system, supporting a compact optical sight mounted on top. The grip is ergonomic and pistol-style, while the stock is solid and angular, providing stability and control. The trigger guard is large and rounded, allowing for gloved use, and the overall construction suggests a focus on durability and urban tactical applications.
description: A modern, matte black tactical shotgun with a short barrel, optical sight, and ergonomic pistol grip. It features a solid, angular stock and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical barrel and suppressor, with the optical sight and rail system barely visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the shotgun, including the optical sight, Picatinny rail, ergonomic grip, and solid stock.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock and grip, with the barrel and muzzle device aligned away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, showing the same tactical features and overall structure.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with a cylindrical muzzle device; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth contours and no finger grooves
